zh.lifeSummary: Mary Sleeper於1612年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。她和Chandler至少有1個女兒。她去世於1659年3月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年47歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sleeper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a lazy or sluggish person, from Middle English sleper ‘sleeper’ (Old English slæpere).

variants.name: Slape
meanings: English: from Middle English slape, slepe ‘slippery muddy place, slipway’ (Old English slǣp). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a muddy place or a slipway, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Sleap (Shropshire), Slepe, now Saint Ives (Huntingdonshire), or Slape in Netherbury (Dorset). See also Sleeper .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: Mary Sleeper was born in 1612, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. She had at least 1 daughter with Chandler. She died on 17 March 1659, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 47, and was buried in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Sleeperは1612年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで生まれた。彼女はChandlerとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1659年3月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンで47歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Amesbury, Amesbury, Essex, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 아메스버이
ko.Hampton, Hampton, Rockingham, Colony of: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴
ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Sleeper(은)는 1612년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Chandler(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1659년 3월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Sleeper родилась в 1612 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Chandler. Она умерла 17 марта 1659 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.
